form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished fourth in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 365m at this track behind Tiggerlong Sassy, beaten 4 lengths (21.35). Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished fourth in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 365m at this track behind Tiggerlong Sassy, beaten 4 lengths (21.35). Hard to have this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped off heels in the turn to the home straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 520m. Should show more than the latest offering. Has claims.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished seventh at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 520m. Should show more than the latest offering. Has claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the home turn came together.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance leading throughout to score by 1.75 lengths in a Special conditions G3 last start at Sandown, clocking an excellent 29.39 for the 515m trip. In form and rates on top again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Eye-catching performance leading throughout to score by 1.75 lengths in a Special conditions G3 last start at Sandown, clocking an excellent 29.39 for the 515m trip. In form and rates on top again.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time when second (25.10) at Goulburn, making it two placings on end. Squeeze draw to overcome. Cannot be ruled out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors last time when second (25.10) at Goulburn, making it two placings on end. Squeeze draw to overcome. Cannot be ruled out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the turn to the home straight.

form.formComment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (21.02) at this track in a NG. Lines up from box 6 for the first time. Has the ability and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (21.02) at this track in a NG. Lines up from box 6 for the first time. Has the ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 7 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Has ability but will need the right run to feature here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 7 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Has ability but will need the right run to feature here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the catching pen raced tightly, shifted out and came together.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage eighth but before that won by a nose at Wentworth Park (29.64) beating Dennis Keeping in a Grade 5 on April 5. Can't make much of a case this time.
